title: Assistant Store Manager - Godrej Interio - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Godrej Interio - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Godrej Interio are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Godrej Interio:
Godrej Interio is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Godrej Interio!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
